Class CodePointIterator

java.lang.Object
de.kleinert.edna.reader.CodePointIterator
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable, Iterator<Integer>, PrimitiveIterator<Integer, IntConsumer>, PrimitiveIterator.OfInt
public final class CodePointIterator extends Object implements PrimitiveIterator.OfInt, AutoCloseable
